title: Aw-Switch
description: This is a modpack designed for a group of friends and combines something for everyone. From magic to technology, from farming to adventure.
body:
# Ultimate Friends Adventure Pack

**A Complete Minecraft Experience for Every Type of Player**

Welcome to the Ultimate Friends Adventure Pack - a carefully curated collection of over 100 mods designed to bring friends together in the most expansive Minecraft experience possible. Whether you're a tech wizard, magic enthusiast, dedicated farmer, or fearless explorer, this pack has something special waiting for you.

## 🔮 Magic & Mysticism
Dive deep into the arcane arts with *Botania's* botanical magic, master powerful spells with *Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks*, and explore the dark arts through *Blood Magic*. Enhance your magical journey with *Mystical Agriculture* to grow your own resources, while *Spellbound Weapons* adds enchanted armaments to your arsenal.

## ⚡ Technology & Automation
Build industrial empires with *Mekanism's* comprehensive tech suite, automate complex processes with the complete *Thermal Series* (Foundation, Expansion, Dynamics, and more), and create sophisticated storage networks using *Applied Energistics 2*. *Industrial Foregoing* and *Tinkers' Construct* provide additional layers of automation and customization, while *Draconic Evolution* offers end-game technological supremacy.

## 🌱 Farming & Culinary Arts
Transform your agricultural experience with *Farmer's Delight* and its family of expansion mods including *Nether's Delight*, *End's Delight*, *Ocean's Delight*, and more. *Botany Pots* revolutionizes farming, while various "Let's Do" mods like *Vinery* and *HerbalBrews* add depth to food production and brewing.

## 🗺️ Exploration & Adventure
Venture into enhanced dimensions with *The Aether* and *Deep Aether*, discover improved structures through YUNG's complete collection (Better Dungeons, Strongholds, Ocean Monuments, and more), and explore diverse biomes with *Biomes O' Plenty*. *Waystones* ensures you never lose your way, while *Traveler's Backpack* keeps you prepared for any journey.

## 🏠 Building & Decoration
Express your creativity with an extensive furniture collection including *Handcrafted*, *Fantasy's Furniture*, *Another Furniture*, and *Fetzi's Asian Decoration*. *Supplementaries* adds countless decorative options, while *Connected Glass* and *Fusion* provide seamless building textures.

## 🎯 Quality of Life
Enjoy enhanced performance with *FerriteCore* and *Entity Culling*, improved visuals with *Distant Horizons* and *3D Skin Layers*, and convenient features like *Iron Chests*, *Trash Cans*, and *Easy Villagers*. *Just Enough Items* keeps your recipes organized, while *WTHIT* provides essential block information.

## 🤝 Perfect for Multiplayer
This pack shines brightest when shared with friends. Multiple progression paths mean everyone can pursue their interests while contributing to group projects. Combine the tech expert's automated systems with the mage's mystical creations and the builder's stunning architecture for truly collaborative gameplay.

## System Requirements
- **Minecraft Version:** 1.20.1
- **Mod Loader:** Forge
- **Recommended RAM:** 6-8GB minimum
- **Total Mods:** 100+

Embark on the ultimate Minecraft adventure where magic meets technology, exploration rewards the brave, and creativity knows no bounds. Your perfect multiplayer experience awaits!
